Headline: #87 87th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 87th/Ashland.
ShortDescription: Eastbound #87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Ashland, 79th, Loomis, then resume their normal route on 87th due to street blockage nr 87th/Ashland

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Ashland, 79th, Loomis, then resume their normal route on 87th due to street blockage near 87th/Ashland.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
